Two canal-front villas on a quiet residential plot — a tropical-modern rental asset with a defined path to exit.

Property Layout Plan
01 — The Site

A canal on one
side, a road on
the other.

The plot sits between a public canal and a public road, oriented north–south. Two identical villas are set back from both edges behind a planted perimeter, linked by a single garden path — private from the street, open to the water.

  • Canal Width3 m
  • Road Width4 m
  • Land Size49 Sq. Wah
  • US Equivalent≈2,110 sq ft
02 — Villa 1

Two storeys,
open on every
side.

Sliding glass walls fold back the ground floor to the deck; a cantilevered roof shades an upper-level balcony built for long evenings. Built from natural wood and lime-washed olive render, designed to read as part of the tree line, not against it.

  • Total House AreaApprox. 140 sqm
  • Ground FloorApprox. 70 sqm
  • Upper FloorApprox. 70 sqm
  • House Footprint8 × 10 m
Villa 1 — Exterior
03 — Inside Villa 1

Ground floor for living,
upper floor for stillness.

Each villa is a private two-storey house
Every villa has its own sauna — not shared
Open kitchen, living & dining — ground floor
Master bedroom with ensuite bath
Second bedroom with its own bath
Upper floor: open sauna, shower, dining/seating

6 metres tall,
built from six materials.

Exterior WallOlive Green

05 — The Investment
฿3,000,000
TOTAL INVESTMENT REQUIRED

Two independent, non-contingent return streams — a fixed monthly distribution and a share of the eventual sale.

STREAM 01

Monthly Distribution

฿25,000 / month

Paid to the investor as a priority distribution, independent of sale timing, until the full ฿3,000,000 is repaid — approx. 120 months.

STREAM 02

Sale Proceeds

50% of sale price

On sale, proceeds split 50/50 with the Sponsor — regardless of how much principal has already been repaid.

RENTAL INCOME — SOURCE OF DISTRIBUTION
House 1฿18,000 / mo
House 2฿18,000 / mo
Total Rental Income฿36,000 / mo
To Investor (priority)฿25,000 / mo
To Sponsor (before opex)฿11,000 / mo
SALE EXAMPLE — ILLUSTRATIVE
If sold for฿7,000,000
Investor receives฿3,500,000
Sponsor receives฿3,500,000
Prepared for discussion purposes. Final terms should confirm what backs the ฿25,000/month if collected rent falls short in a given month.

Two villas.
One canal.
A ten-year return.

MONTHLY฿25,000
PRINCIPAL฿3,000,000
